summary: Added normalize_image_bytes() module-level helper + binascii-based base64 detection, refactored image_to_base64 to use it; fixes a double-encoding bug on re-validation; 12/12 tests pass; patch.txt written. Our diffs both touch image_to_base64 body so may need manual merge if combined.
